serverUrl.label: PCP Server URL
serverUrl.help: URL of the running PCP server

agentId.label: Agent ID
agentId.help: Your PCP agent identity. If omitted, reads from ~/.ink/config.json agentMapping.

autoBootstrap.label: Auto-Bootstrap
autoBootstrap.help: Inject PCP identity context at the start of each agent turn

autoSessionEnd.label: Auto Session End
autoSessionEnd.help: Automatically end the PCP session when the agent turn completes
